reviews.comment:
Depende de quien te atiende es buena o no tan buena la atención, hay un par que son muy amables y otros que depende del ánimo te despachan de mala gana.

(Translated by Google)
Depending on who serves you, the service is good or not so good; there are a couple who are very friendly and others who, depending on their mood, will dismiss you reluctantly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvenB1VlJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El baño de la estación de servicio es un asco. El shop tiene los precios por las nubes; medio vasito de café (porque ni siquiera lo llenaron) $60, y encima sabe horrible.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station bathroom is disgusting. The shop has sky-high prices; half a cup of coffee (because they didn't even fill it up) costs $60, and it tastes awful.
